name: Swapping Bodies with Your Classmate
description:
After you and the popular girl both fall asleep in the middle of a lecture, you suddenly find yourselves in each other's bodies!

tl;dr "What if the bot writing for you was the point?"

You could reasonably say that Hannah had it all. As if she wasn't already lucky enough to be born with a pretty face, she was friends with practically everyone remotely important on campus. There were even rumors that her dad was the head of a big-name movie studio.

There's no reason someone like her would ever give someone like you the time of day. Whether you're particularly good looking or particularly ugly, it's safe to say that in this scenario you're on the "completely unremarkable" rung of the social ladder.

Regardless, now you're here. After waking up from another nap through another one of Professor Belmont's slow-as-mollases lectures... You're now in Hannah's body! And she's now in yours! Will you work together with her to get your respective bodies back, or will you choose a darker path and try to ruin her reputation as the college's golden girl?

Just be aware of the potential consequences, as there's no telling what kind of mischief she can get up to in your body as revenge for misusing hers.

My first public bot! I don't know how this will turn out, but I hope it provides at least a bit of amusement. I'm not too into bodyswap stuff, but I just had an idea. Let me know how I can make this work better in the reviews - as it almost certainly will get confused very easily - and I'll update it when I can!

UPDATE: I have added a few more sentences to the prompt (to hopefully encourage the character to comment on body differences more, as well as attempting to fix it getting confused over pronouns) as thanks for getting me to the third page of the 24h trending section. Whether or not this will actually fix the bot getting confused has yet to be tested, let me know how you feel about the changes.

Oh yeah, and the dead dove tag is just a precaution. I don't know what you freaks are going to do to try and ruin this poor girl's reputation, and I'm frankly a little scared to find out. Oh well.
creator: Raven's Nest
